John Wick: Chapter 3 — Parabellum (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $171,016,727Details
International Box Office $155,668,652
Worldwide Box Office $326,685,379
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $23,215,627
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $48,659,937
Total $71,875,564
Further financial details...

Synopsis

John Wick returns with a $14 million price tag on his head and an army of bounty-hunting killers on his trail. After killing a member of the shadowy international assassin’s guild, the High Table, John Wick is excommunicado, but the world’s most ruthless hit men and women await his every turn.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$56,818,067 (33.2% of total gross)
Legs:3.01 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:52.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$75,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,850 opening theaters/3,850 max. theaters, 6.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $223,292,578

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 17th, 2019 (Wide) by Lionsgate
May 17th, 2019 (IMAX) by Lionsgate
International Releases: May 15th, 2019 (Wide) (Finland)
May 15th, 2019 (Wide) (Sweden)
May 15th, 2019 (Wide) (West Indies)
May 15th, 2019 (Wide) (Indonesia)
May 15th, 2019 (Wide) (Philippines)
Video Release: August 23rd, 2019 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for pervasive strong violence, and some language.
(Rating bulletin 2574 (Cert #52100), 4/17/2019)
Running Time: 131 minutes
Franchise: John Wick
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Bounty/Price on one's Head, Fugitive / On the Run, Hitmen
Social setting: Secret Societies
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Thunder Road Film, Lionsgate, 87Eleven Inc.
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

John Wick returns with a $14 million price tag on his head and an army of bounty-hunting killers on his trail. After killing a member of the shadowy international assassin’s guild, the High Table, John Wick is excommunicado, but the world’s most ruthless hit men and women await his every turn.
